title: Forgot Your Password?
drDigitalIntro: Forgot your Mac login password? Use another admin account to reset it. Forgot an account password? Use the 'Forgot password?' link on the website — it sends a reset email. For Apple ID, go to iforgot.apple.com. Don't use random passwords you can't remember — use a password manager. Write down your passwords somewhere safe (or use iCloud Keychain).
drDigitalSuccess: You know how to recover from forgotten passwords!
